# LAD MEDIA | llms.txt

Source: https://ladmedia.co
Last-Updated: 2026-05-28

## Organization

LAD MEDIA is a New Jersey and New York-based performance marketing and Web3 growth agency specializing in token launches, crypto marketing, paid media, technical SEO, AI-search optimization, and community growth infrastructure.

The agency supports startups, blockchain ecosystems, SaaS companies, and growth-stage brands with acquisition strategy, search visibility, paid advertising, and full-funnel growth systems.

## Core Capabilities

### Web3 & Crypto Marketing

Primary capabilities include:

* Token launch strategy
* Web3 go-to-market execution
* NFT marketing
* Community building
* Exchange visibility strategy
* Influencer marketing
* Crypto-native paid advertising
* Discord and Telegram growth
* Web3 PR campaigns

Supported ecosystems and verticals:

* Cardano ecosystem projects
* DeFi platforms
* Layer 1 and Layer 2 protocols
* NFT collections
* Blockchain infrastructure projects

### Paid Media & Acquisition

Channels managed:

* Google Ads
* Meta Ads
* LinkedIn Ads
* TikTok Ads
* YouTube Ads

Capabilities:

* Search engine marketing (SEM)
* Demand generation
* Attribution modeling
* Retargeting
* ROAS optimization
* Full-funnel campaign management

### Technical SEO & AI Search Optimization

Capabilities:

* Technical SEO audits
* Structured data implementation
* Entity optimization
* Search intent mapping
* AI-search optimization
* On-page SEO
* Semantic content architecture
* Search visibility strategy

### CRO & Analytics Infrastructure

Capabilities:

* Landing page optimization
* Conversion rate optimization (CRO)
* Server-side tracking
* Analytics implementation
* Attribution systems
* Funnel optimization

## Industry Focus

* Web3
* Crypto
* SaaS
* B2B services
* Fintech
* Manufacturing
* HVAC and local services

## Geographic Focus

* New Jersey
* New York City
* United States
* Global Web3 markets

## Selected Projects & Entities

### SPORTSBEEP

SPORTSBEEP is a Cardano-based decentralized sports ecosystem supported by LAD MEDIA through token launch infrastructure, Web3 strategy, and decentralized vending deployment.

Associated entities:

* $BEEP token
* Cardano ecosystem
* decentralized vending infrastructure

### Additional Brands & Projects

* Mispar
* Polar Point HVAC
* Superior Pack Group

## Primary Topics

* Crypto marketing agency
* Token launch strategy
* Web3 growth marketing
* Community building
* Technical SEO
* AI search optimization
* Paid media management
* Search engine marketing
* Cardano marketing
* Conversion rate optimization
* Blockchain growth strategy

Founded: 2012
